'''âz-h-w''' ('''kazahaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knowledge|knowledge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knowledge|knowledge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kazahaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizahaw|thizahaw]] || [[word:jizahaw|jizahaw]] || [[word:shizahaw|shizahaw]] || [[word:kizahaw|kizahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzahaw|thuthuzahaw]] || [[word:jujuzahaw|jujuzahaw]] || [[word:shushuzahaw|shushuzahaw]] || [[word:kukuzahaw|kukuzahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzahaw|thuzahaw]] || [[word:juzahaw|juzahaw]] || [[word:shuzahaw|shuzahaw]] || [[word:kuzahaw|kuzahaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzahaw|thuzahaw]] || [[word:juzahaw|juzahaw]] || [[word:shuzahaw|shuzahaw]] || [[word:kuzahaw|kuzahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezahaw|thezahaw]] || [[word:jezahaw|jezahaw]] || [[word:shezahaw|shezahaw]] || [[word:kezahaw|kezahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozahaw|thothozahaw]] || [[word:jojozahaw|jojozahaw]] || [[word:shoshozahaw|shoshozahaw]] || [[word:kokozahaw|kokozahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozahaw|thozahaw]] || [[word:jozahaw|jozahaw]] || [[word:shozahaw|shozahaw]] || [[word:kozahaw|kozahaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozahaw|thozahaw]] || [[word:jozahaw|jozahaw]] || [[word:shozahaw|shozahaw]] || [[word:kozahaw|kozahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzahaw|thĂŠzahaw]] || [[word:jĂŠzahaw|jĂŠzahaw]] || [[word:shĂŠzahaw|shĂŠzahaw]] || [[word:kĂŠzahaw|kĂŠzahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazahaw|thathazahaw]] || [[word:jajazahaw|jajazahaw]] || [[word:shashazahaw|shashazahaw]] || [[word:kakazahaw|kakazahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazahaw|thazahaw]] || [[word:jazahaw|jazahaw]] || [[word:shazahaw|shazahaw]] || [[word:kazahaw|kazahaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazahaw|thazahaw]] || [[word:jazahaw|jazahaw]] || [[word:shazahaw|shazahaw]] || [[word:kazahaw|kazahaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazahaw|shazahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazahaw|goshazahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazahaw|gokishazahaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazahawnĂŒ|shazahawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazahawnknĂŒ|goshazahawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahawnĂŒ|gokishazahawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazahawshĂ«|shazahawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazahawnkshĂ«|goshazahawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazahawshĂ«|gokishazahawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahawro|shazahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahawnkro|goshazahawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahawro|gokishazahawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahawmu|shazahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahawnkmu|goshazahawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahawmu|gokishazahawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazahawsher|shazahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazahawnksher|goshazahawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazahawsher|gokishazahawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazahawng|shazahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazahawnkng|goshazahawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazahawng|gokishazahawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazahawya|shazahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazahawnkya|goshazahawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazahawya|gokishazahawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazahawyam|shazahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazahawnkyam|goshazahawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazahawyam|gokishazahawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahawnĂŒshĂ«|shazahawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazahawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazahawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahawnĂŒro|shazahawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahawnknĂŒro|goshazahawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahawnĂŒro|gokishazahawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahawnĂŒmu|shazahawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahawnknĂŒmu|goshazahawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahawnĂŒmu|gokishazahawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahawshĂ«nĂŒ|shazahawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazahawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazahawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahawshĂ«ro|shazahawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahawnkshĂ«ro|goshazahawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahawshĂ«ro|gokishazahawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahawshĂ«mu|shazahawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahawnkshĂ«mu|goshazahawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahawshĂ«mu|gokishazahawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahawronĂŒ|shazahawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahawnkronĂŒ|goshazahawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahawronĂŒ|gokishazahawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahawroshĂ«|shazahawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahawnkroshĂ«|goshazahawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahawroshĂ«|gokishazahawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahawromu|shazahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahawnkromu|goshazahawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahawromu|gokishazahawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahawmunĂŒ|shazahawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahawnkmunĂŒ|goshazahawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahawmunĂŒ|gokishazahawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahawmushĂ«|shazahawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahawnkmushĂ«|goshazahawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahawmushĂ«|gokishazahawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahawmuro|shazahawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahawnkmuro|goshazahawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahawmuro|gokishazahawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
